name: Herman Quick Biscuit
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the flour, baking powder, salt, and baking soda.
2. In a separate bowl, whisk together the milk and oil until combined.
3. Gradually add the wet ingredients to the dry ingredients, stirring with a fork until just mixed (avoid overmixing).
4. Turn off the heat.
5. Form the dough into biscuits and place on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper.
6. Bake at 350°F for 10 minutes.
Yield: 12-15 biscuits.
